asset_name: Tutorial, tooltip, first-run guidance, and control prompt UI
notes: Bulk-generation-first candidate created with built-in imagegen. QA, legal/license review, final approval, and runtime integration deferred until all candidates exist.
final_prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: tutorial and onboarding UI pack for Orbwalker
Primary request: production candidate UI component sheet for first-run guidance, tooltips, and control prompts.
Subject: tooltip panel, compact tutorial callout frame, control prompt frame, finger/drag gesture icon, highlight ring, confirmation button frame, small warning/help badge.
Style/medium: polished stylized 2D fantasy UI chrome, clear mobile tutorial readability.
Composition/framing: organized component sheet on neutral background, separated components with padding, no labels, no embedded instructional text.
Lighting/mood: helpful, calm, readable, less ornate than combat UI.
Color palette: dark stone, soft gold, teal/cyan guidance highlights, muted parchment panel.
Constraints: no readable text, no labels, no logo, no watermark, no casino imagery, no gore, keep icon gestures simple and universal.
